pre_check_flags.detail: Diff size looks larger than expected: changed_lines=920, expected≈10, ratio=92.00, files=10, hunks=42.

criteria.name: Unified post_topic tool definition
criteria.evidence: Verified in src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:252-306. `post_topic` is advertised before legacy tools, has required fields `proposed_key`, `headline`, `source_message_ids`, `blocks`, has `blocks.minItems = 1`, omits top-level `body` and `sections`, and describes editorial complexity rather than media presence.

criteria.name: Legacy tool aliases remain accepted
criteria.evidence: Verified dispatch includes `post_simple_topic` and `post_sectioned_topic` alongside `post_topic` at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:1151. Tool descriptions are prefixed `[DEPRECATED — use post_topic]` at lines 311 and 333. `_summary_for_tool` preserves `{body, media}` and `{body, sections, blocks?}` shapes at lines 3737-3752.

criteria.name: Legacy post_simple media guard ordering
criteria.evidence: Verified legacy media/source-count guards remain before post_topic block guard at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:1951-1983. Runtime tests passed: `pytest tests/test_topic_editor_core.py tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py -x -q` -> 152 passed.

criteria.name: Single intro block with media accepted and renders cleanly
criteria.evidence: Runtime test coverage present at tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py:2194 and NebSH smoke at :2486. Targeted tests passed. Renderer path at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:4284-4321 adds header for intro without section title markup, then media units.

criteria.name: Empty post_topic blocks rejected as tool_error
criteria.evidence: Verified guard at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:1990-1998 returns `rejected_post_topic` / `post_topic_requires_blocks`; `build_rejected_transition` accepts the action at :3975. Targeted runtime tests passed.

criteria.name: Empty blocks plus stray sections rejected
criteria.evidence: Verified post_topic guard checks only `not has_blocks` at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:1987-1998 and does not consult `has_sections`. Regression test exists at tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py:2317 and passed.

criteria.name: post_topic collision returns tool_error
criteria.evidence: Verified collision map includes `post_topic: rejected_post_topic` at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:2017-2022. Regression test at tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py:2343 passed.

criteria.name: Rejected transition helper accepts rejected_post_topic
criteria.evidence: Verified allowed-action set includes `rejected_post_topic` at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:3975. Action-vocabulary test includes explicit assertion at tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py:1466 and passed.

criteria.name: Normalized block writeback includes post_topic
criteria.evidence: Verified default-media-attached normalized blocks are written back for `post_sectioned_topic` and `post_topic` at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:1936-1942.

criteria.name: Auto-shortlist suggested_actions uses post_topic
criteria.evidence: Verified suggested action string is `post_topic, watch_topic/update sources, or discard_topic` at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:2257-2262. Regression test at tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py:1113 passed.

criteria.name: normalize_document_blocks unchanged for legacy shapes
criteria.evidence: Function still converts existing `blocks`, then legacy `body` + `sections` at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:4062-4125. New regression test in tests/test_topic_editor_core.py:130 passed.

criteria.name: Prompt removes media-to-sectioned steering
criteria.evidence: Verified prompt now says one creator dropping one artifact is exactly one intro block at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:104-112. Grep evidence showed retired media-to-sectioned phrases were absent.

criteria.name: Prompt includes brevity and examples
criteria.evidence: Verified brevity rules at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:114-119 and worked do/don't example at :121-137.

criteria.name: Prompt role label is non-editor
criteria.evidence: Verified prompt starts `You are the BNDC live-update writer` at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:55.

criteria.name: Action coverage test updated
criteria.evidence: Verified test includes `post_topic` and `rejected_post_topic` in allowed/configured actions and transition assertion at tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py:1413-1474. Targeted tests passed.

criteria.name: Full pytest suite passes
criteria.evidence: Ran `pytest -x -q`: 658 passed, 19 skipped, 4 warnings in 7.12s.

criteria.name: NebSH end-to-end-style test produces one block
criteria.evidence: Verified deterministic NebSH-style test at tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py:2486 asserts one block, text+media units, and no section header markup. Targeted tests passed.

criteria.name: Telemetry/action labels preserved
criteria.evidence: Verified `action_by_tool` maps new `post_topic` to `post_topic` and legacy aliases to `post_simple` / `post_sectioned` at src/features/summarising/topic_editor.py:1944-1949. `_summary_for_tool` is called with original `call['name']` at :2043.

criteria.name: File size and separation of concerns
criteria.evidence: `topic_editor.py` changed by 153 lines and keeps tool definitions, prompt, dispatch, summary storage, normalization, and rendering in existing sections. `tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py` grew substantially, but it is an existing focused runtime test file; the spirit of the production-code separation target is met.

criteria.name: Manual dev cron smoke
criteria.evidence: Requires observing rendered Discord output on the next dev live-update cron tick. Not verifiable in this automated review.

summary: Approved. All must criteria pass, including targeted topic-editor tests and the full suite. The diff includes a significant unrelated-looking admin_chat/tooling expansion needed for full-suite health; I did not gate on it because tests pass and the topic-editor success criteria are satisfied, but it is worth keeping an eye on during final human review.

task_verdicts.reviewer_verdict: Pass. Audit notes match the inspected topic-editor surfaces and tests.
Pass. `post_topic` schema, ordering, minItems, and deprecated legacy descriptions are present.
Pass. Dispatch accepts `post_topic`, writeback is generalized, guards are split, and `rejected_post_topic` is wired through rejection infrastructure.
Pass. `post_topic` stores blocks-only, while legacy simple and sectioned storage shapes are preserved.
Pass. Auto-shortlist suggested actions now steer to `post_topic` and not `post_sectioned_topic`.
Pass. Prompt now uses writer framing, minimum-block guidance, brevity rules, and the worked do/don't example while retaining source/media rules.
Pass. Publisher trace is correct; intro blocks do not emit section headers and media units follow text units.
Pass. Required runtime/core tests are present and targeted suite passed.
Pass. Targeted suites and full `pytest -x -q` passed. Extra admin/package changes are outside the topic-editor scope but are test-green.

sense_check_verdicts.verdict: Confirmed. Audit covered the expected tool, prompt, dispatch, persistence, shortlist, rejection, publisher, and test locations.
Confirmed. New tool schema and legacy deprecation descriptions match the plan.
Confirmed. Dispatch edits and guard ordering are present; `post_topic` does not consult `sections` for block-required validation.
Confirmed. `_summary_for_tool` uses blocks-only for new tool and preserves legacy shapes with original tool name.
Confirmed. Suggested-actions string uses `post_topic`; no threshold logic was changed in the inspected diff.
Confirmed. Prompt content satisfies the settled guidance and preserves citation/media safety rails.
Confirmed. Renderer emits header/body for intro and media afterward, with section title markup only for section blocks.
Confirmed. Required tests are present and passed in the targeted suite.
Confirmed. Targeted suites and full suite passed in this review; manual cron smoke remains waived/info.
